{{Infobox character
| name = Gloria
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

''See also: [[Gloria Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Gloria is a doll belonging to [[Simon]]. She possesses a painted wooden face featuring a broad smile, white hair styled in an intricate bun secured by golden chains, and a pink, fluffy dress decorated with gold ornaments. She communicates through a mental voice that resembles whispering wind traveling through a long tunnel. Gloria is capable of expressing a wide range of emotions and opinions, including pride, sympathy, disgust, and frustration. She has also expressed dark sentiments, such as suggesting someone should die.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Gloria]] is a doll that could warn [[Kai]] of [[Valin]]'s strikes.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Gloria is a doll characterized by her white hair styled in an ornate bun and a painted wooden face. She serves as a translator for [[Leah]] by communicating with [[Simon]] through a mental voice that resembles whispering wind echoing through a long tunnel. During the events of the story, her physical form suffers significant damage, leaving her chest cracked along with her torn dress and hair. She was eventually found sitting nearby with her clothing and hair in a ruined state.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Gloria]] is a doll with a painted wooden face and white hair tied in an ornate bun.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Gloria]] possesses a mental voice that sounds like it is coming through a long tunnel filled with whispering wind.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Gloria]] communicates with [[Simon]] mentally.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Gloria]] is a doll that translates for [[Leah]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Gloria]] is a doll.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Gloria]]'s chest was cracked and her hair and dress were torn.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Gloria]] was sitting nearby with her hair and dress ruined.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
